cards.basicText: While this is the top card of your discard, increase the value of your cards by 2.
cards.title: BE RIGHT BACK

cards.afterText: If you have another friendly fighter adjacent to the opposing fighter, deal 2 damage to the opposing fighter.
cards.title: RIGHT BEHIND YOU

cards.duringText: If you share no zones with the space you started in this turn, this card's value is 6 instead.
cards.title: JUMP SCARE

cards.afterText: If you're in a zone with no opposing fighters, you may place 1 of your fighters on an empty space.
cards.title: WHERE AM I?

cards.immediateText: Cancel all effects on your opponent's card.
cards.title: SURPRISE STAB

cards.duringText: If you attacked the opposing fighter with a different fighter this turn, this card's value is 7 instead.
cards.title: DOUBLE FEATURE

cards.afterText: If you lost the combat, gain 1 action.
cards.basicText: This card's effects can't be canceled.
cards.title: GUT YOU LIKE A FISH

cards.afterText: Choose 3 combat cards with different names in your discard, your opponent chooses 1 to return to your hand. Remove this from the game.
cards.title: DO YOU LIKE SCARY MOVIES?

cards.afterText: The opponent discards 1 random card. Move both fighters in the combat up to a number of spaces equal to its BOOST value. Ghostfaces adjacent to the opposing fighter recover 1 health.
cards.title: GET THE BLOOD PUMPING

cards.afterText: If you lost, place yourself adjacent to the attacker and discard 1 random card. Deal damage to adjacent fighters equal to its BOOST value. Then if you discarded a Scheme, play it.
cards.title: MANIA

cards.duringText: If Ghostface would be defeated this combat, prevent all damage, set their health to 2 and you gain 1 action on your next turn.
cards.title: ONE LAST SCARE

cards.basicText:
Draw 1 card.
Leave this in play until triggered. At the end of an opponent's turn, if an opposing Hero is adjacent to any fighter, deal 1 damage to 1 or both of them.
cards.title: RULE 1: NO HOOKING UP

cards.basicText:
Draw 1 card.
Leave this in play until triggered. At the end of an opponent's turn if they have 7 or more cards in hand, they discard 2 random cards.
cards.title: RULE 2: NO PARTYING

cards.basicText:
Draw 1 card.
Leave this in play until triggered. At the end of an opponent's turn, if their Hero is not in the same zone as a friendly fighter, look at their hand, they discard 1 card.
cards.title: RULE 3: NEVER GO ALONE

cards.basicText:
Draw 1 card.
Leave this in play until triggered. If an opposing fighter takes 2 or more damage in combat, deal 2 additional damage to them.
cards.title: RULE 4: SEQUELS ARE BLOODIER

cards.basicText:
Draw 1 card.
Leave this in play until triggered. If a Ghostface wins combat on defense, recover 2 health divided however you like between your fighters.
cards.title: RULE 5: KILLERS AREN'T HUMAN

hero.name: GHOSTFACE (2x)
hero.specialAbility: The first time each turn you lose a combat, you may move your fighters up to 2 spaces divided between them.

sidekick.name: Sidekick
sidekick.quote: "Now Sid, don't you blame the movies, movies don't create psychos, movies make psychos more creative!"

name: Ghostface
note:
HSR Remastered: https://drive.google.com/drive/folders/1hMfd1o1Eab6ZK195024Cldi3LdyKeEjN

Part of Hack/Slash/Repeat vol.1

Jason Voorhees: https://unmatched.cards/decks/DOPE/versions/_yGrHv7J

Chucky and Tiffany: https://unmatched.cards/decks/Den8/versions/N_dmI_n6

Changelog
------------
v1.0: Cleaned up text. Removed HIDE entirely, now works when you lose combat and moves the two Ghostfaces however you want.

v0.3: HIDE now triggers after combat so they can't completely avoid effects like Wily Fighting. Where Am I? no longer allows for both to hide (and thus Vanish), it allows a Dash + Hide.
v0.2: NOISE removed. Completely reworked ability.
v0.1: Created
